output.explanation: This circuit uses a battery (power source) that provides electrical energy to the circuit, a resistor (current limiter) that limits and controls the flow of current, and a led (light emitter) that emits light when current flows through it. Current flows from the battery → resistor → led. This causes the LED to emit light.

component_details.name: battery
component_details.description: provides electrical energy to the circuit

component_details.name: resistor
component_details.description: limits and controls the flow of current

component_details.name: led
component_details.description: emits light when current flows through it

output.flow_description: Current flows from the battery → resistor → led. This causes the LED to emit light.

output.explanation: This circuit uses a battery (power source) that provides electrical energy to the circuit, a resistor (current limiter) that limits and controls the flow of current, a transistor (switch/amplifier) that amplifies signals or acts as an electronic switch, and a motor (mechanical output) that converts electrical energy into rotational motion. Current flows from the battery → resistor → transistor → motor. This causes the motor to spin.

component_details.name: battery
component_details.description: provides electrical energy to the circuit

component_details.name: resistor
component_details.description: limits and controls the flow of current

component_details.name: transistor
component_details.description: amplifies signals or acts as an electronic switch

component_details.name: motor
component_details.description: converts electrical energy into rotational motion

output.flow_description: Current flows from the battery → resistor → transistor → motor. This causes the motor to spin.

output.explanation: This circuit uses a power supply (power source) that supplies regulated DC voltage to the circuit, an arduino (microcontroller) that runs code to control other components, a ldr (light sensor) that changes resistance based on light intensity, a resistor (current limiter) that limits and controls the flow of current, and a led (light emitter) that emits light when current flows through it. Current flows from the power supply → arduino. Current flows from the ldr → resistor → arduino. Current flows from the arduino → led. This causes the LED to emit light.

component_details.name: power_supply
component_details.description: supplies regulated DC voltage to the circuit

component_details.name: arduino
component_details.description: runs code to control other components

component_details.name: ldr
component_details.description: changes resistance based on light intensity

component_details.name: resistor
component_details.description: limits and controls the flow of current

component_details.name: led
component_details.description: emits light when current flows through it

output.flow_description: Current flows from the power supply → arduino. Current flows from the ldr → resistor → arduino. Current flows from the arduino → led. This causes the LED to emit light.
